title: ME student Eva Stafne awarded prestigious 2026 Goldwater Scholarship
summary_en: Eva Stafne, a University of Wisconsin-Madison junior majoring in mechanical engineering and completing a certificate in international engineering, has received a 2026 Goldwater Scholarship, the premier undergraduate scholarship in mathematics, engineering and the natural sciences…
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校3名本科生荣获2026年度美国戈德华特奖学金

title: Leveling up: How a passion for engineering led Travis Frederick to the NFL and into the dragon’s lair
summary_en: Fans of Travis Frederick, the former Wisconsin Badgers and Dallas Cowboys center affectionately known as “Fredbeard,” know of his many accomplishments on the field: first team All-American; 2025 Badger Hall of Fame inductee; first-round draft…
title_cn: 前美国国家橄榄球联盟球员特拉维斯·弗雷德里克结合工程专业背景实现跨界创业

title: New tool for researchers makes it easier to analyze individual neurons
summary_en: The electrical properties of a neuron paint a picture of its development and function. A new user-friendly and accessible tool developed at the Waisman Center at the University of Wisconsin-Madison, with the help of biomedical…
title_cn: 美国威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校研发出单个神经元分析新型科研工具
summary_cn: 美国威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校韦斯曼中心联合生物医学工程领域科研人员，成功研发名为半自动微电极阵列锋电位排序软件（英文简称SAMS）的新型科研工具，可依托锋电位排序技术实现单个神经元而非神经元集群的电活动分析，目前该工具已免费上线，供全球相关领域科研人员获取使用。
